blocks.content: In this milestone, you enable ongoing instrumentation for your namespace. Once enabled, any new service that deploys to this namespace will be automatically instrumented with the same settings.
In the namespace settings panel, find the **Ongoing Instrumentation** toggle.
> **Tip:** If you also want new services to have traces, logs, or profiling enabled, turn those toggles on as well. New services inherit all enabled settings.
Confirm the settings panel closes and you're back at the Manage tab.

The namespace is now configured for ongoing instrumentation. Any new service that Alloy discovers in this namespace will be automatically instrumented.

In the next milestone, you'll verify the setting is applied correctly.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Application namespace settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#application-namespace-settings)
